reasoning: Very narrow time window (40 days until July 1, 2025). The Diversity Visa lottery results for FY2026 were just released on May 3, 2025, meaning the immediate window to stop the lottery has passed, and actual issuance for these winners won't begin until October 2025 — well past the July 1 deadline. While Trump strongly opposes the program, he did not explicitly end it by name in an executive order during his first term or in his initial 2025 flurry of orders (which focused instead on border security, Tren de Aragua, and birthright citizenship). The resolution stringently requires the exact phrase "Diversity Visa" in a published White House presidential action, making it highly unlikely to occur in the next month and a half without an urgent programmatic trigger.
